title: China economic growth accelerates to 5% in first quarter — but Iran war clouds outlook
summary_full: Beijing had lowered its growth target this year to a range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal on record going back to the early 1990s.
summary_public: Beijing had lowered its growth target this year to a range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal on record going back to the early 1990s.
